sourceList.title: Legacy NFS Source: Alice Gifford - birth-name: Alice Gifford
Stephen Giffard (alive 1438) of Thuborough, who inherited Spencer Combe on his 1st marriage to Jone Spencer, by whom he left a daughter, Alice Giffard, heiress of Combe

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Gifford於大約1445年出生在英國英格蘭戴文素可姆時，她的父親Stephen Gifford19歲，母親Joan Spencer27歲。她和William Wollacombe至少有2個兒子。她去世於1512年2月24日在英國戴文霍爾頓享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Gifford于大约1445年出生在英国英格兰戴文素可姆时，她的父亲Stephen Gifford19岁，母亲Joan Spencer27岁。她和William Wollacombe至少有2个儿子。她去世于1512年2月24日在英国戴文霍爾頓享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Gifford was born about 1445, in Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Stephen Gifford, was 19 and her mother, Joan Spencer, was 27. She had at least 2 sons with William Wollacombe. She died on 24 February 1512, in Holbeton, Devon, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Gifford est née environ 1445, à Sutcombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Gifford, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan Spencer, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec William Wollacombe. Elle est décédée le 24 février 1512, à Holbeton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Gifford um 1445 in Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen Gifford 19 und ihre Mutter Joan Spencer 27. Sie hatte mit William Wollacombe mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 24. Februar 1512 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Holbeton, Devon, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gifford è nata il circa 1445 nel Sutcombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Stephen Gifford, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Joan Spencer, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con William Wollacombe. Morì il 24 febbraio 1512, nel Holbeton, Devon, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Giffordが約1445年にイギリスイギリスデボンストコンベで生まれた時，父Stephen Giffordは19歳，母Joan Spencerは27歳であった。彼女はWilliam Wollacombeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1512年2月24日にイギリスデボンホールベトンで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Gifford(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 수트코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Gifford(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Spencer(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 William Wollacombe(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 2월 24일 영국 데폰 홀베턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gifford nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen Gifford, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan Spencer, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com William Wollacombe. Ela faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1512, em Holbeton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Gifford родилась около 1445 г. в местности суткомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Stephen Gifford было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Spencer, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от William Wollacombe. Она умерла 24 февраля 1512 г. в местности холбетон, девон, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Gifford nació aproximadamente 1445, en Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen Gifford, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Joan Spencer, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con William Wollacombe. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1512, en Holbeton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
